notes: Logical EURUSD/GBPUSD market-neutral sleeve from the APPROVED QM5_10309 card. The package is evaluated as one work item; physical per-symbol runs are not valid evidence for this strategy.
GBPUSD.DWX is the M15 tester host (registered slot 1). EURUSD.DWX is provisioned as the foreign leg (registered slot 0); both legs share one RISK_FIXED package budget.
